subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 09/17] exportd/mountd: add netlink support for the auth.unix.ip cache

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with the patch series, including missing error handling and unclear code paths. Requested clarification on the purpose of the generic helper function and suggested improvements to the existing code.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series refactors the netlink support for the auth.unix.ip cache in the NFS-utils codebase, introducing a generic helper function and converting existing code to use it. The sunrpc genl family socket setup is also added for handling upcalls from the kernel.
